prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(create_accrual_case gl_account_accruals)
(create_accrual_case operational_unit_sales)
(assign_calculation_service_to_case gl_account_accruals calc_service_primary)
(assign_calculation_service_to_case operational_unit_sales calc_service_secondary)
(apply_calculation_rule_to_case gl_account_accruals calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(apply_calculation_rule_to_case operational_unit_sales calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(finalize_case_calculation gl_account_accruals calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(finalize_case_calculation operational_unit_sales calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(assign_reviewer_to_case gl_account_accruals reviewer_finance_lead)
(assign_reviewer_to_case operational_unit_sales reviewer_finance_lead)
(attach_supporting_document_to_account gl_account_accruals source_dataset_sales_extract supporting_doc_invoice_1234)
(attach_supporting_document_to_unit operational_unit_sales recon_item_sales_to_gl supporting_doc_invoice_1234)
(assemble_journal_posting_reconciled gl_account_accruals operational_unit_sales source_dataset_sales_extract recon_item_sales_to_gl journal_posting_template_01)
(validate_journal_posting_for_control journal_posting_template_01 gl_account_accruals calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(approve_gl_account_for_posting gl_account_accruals journal_posting_template_01)
(approve_operational_unit_for_posting operational_unit_sales journal_posting_template_01)
(create_journal_post_for_accrual_case gl_account_accruals accrual_category_tax calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(create_journal_post_for_accrual_case operational_unit_sales accrual_category_tax calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(finalize_account_posting_and_release_service gl_account_accruals calc_service_primary accrual_category_tax)
(finalize_unit_posting_and_release_service operational_unit_sales calc_service_secondary accrual_category_tax)
(assign_calculation_service_to_case posting_batch_01 calc_service_tertiary)
(apply_calculation_rule_to_case posting_batch_01 calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(finalize_case_calculation posting_batch_01 calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(assign_reviewer_to_case posting_batch_01 reviewer_finance_lead)
(attach_accounting_policy_to_batch posting_batch_01 accounting_policy_standard)
(attach_signoff_procedure_to_batch posting_batch_01 signoff_procedure_escalation)
(execute_control_check posting_batch_01 control_check_balance_reconciliation journal_posting_template_01)
(record_control_check_result posting_batch_01 control_check_balance_reconciliation journal_posting_template_01 calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(assign_external_approval_to_batch posting_batch_01 external_approval_vendor_signoff)
(process_external_approval_for_batch posting_batch_01 control_check_balance_reconciliation journal_posting_template_01 calc_rule_accrual_standard external_approval_vendor_signoff)
(advance_batch_to_approval_stage_policy_path posting_batch_01 accounting_policy_standard reviewer_finance_lead control_check_balance_reconciliation journal_posting_template_01)
(initiate_batch_final_verification_with_full_evidence posting_batch_01 signoff_procedure_escalation control_check_balance_reconciliation journal_posting_template_01)
(attach_report_template_to_batch posting_batch_01 report_template_summary)
(perform_final_reconciliation_and_verification posting_batch_01 gl_account_accruals operational_unit_sales calc_rule_accrual_standard report_template_summary)
(finalize_batch_after_reconciliation posting_batch_01)
(create_journal_post_for_accrual_case posting_batch_01 accrual_category_tax calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(finalize_batch_posting_and_release_service posting_batch_01 calc_service_tertiary accrual_category_tax)
(assign_calculation_service_to_case posting_batch_02 calc_service_primary)
(apply_calculation_rule_to_case posting_batch_02 calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(finalize_case_calculation posting_batch_02 calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(assign_reviewer_to_case posting_batch_02 reviewer_finance_lead)
(attach_accounting_policy_to_batch posting_batch_02 accounting_policy_standard)
(attach_signoff_procedure_to_batch posting_batch_02 signoff_procedure_escalation)
(execute_control_check posting_batch_02 control_check_threshold_test journal_posting_template_01)
(record_control_check_result posting_batch_02 control_check_threshold_test journal_posting_template_01 calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(assign_external_approval_to_batch posting_batch_02 external_approval_audit_committee)
(process_external_approval_for_batch posting_batch_02 control_check_threshold_test journal_posting_template_01 calc_rule_accrual_standard external_approval_audit_committee)
(advance_batch_to_approval_stage_policy_path posting_batch_02 accounting_policy_standard reviewer_finance_lead control_check_threshold_test journal_posting_template_01)
(initiate_batch_final_verification_with_full_evidence posting_batch_02 signoff_procedure_escalation control_check_threshold_test journal_posting_template_01)
(attach_report_template_to_batch posting_batch_02 report_template_detailed)
(perform_final_reconciliation_and_verification posting_batch_02 gl_account_accruals operational_unit_sales calc_rule_accrual_standard report_template_detailed)
(finalize_batch_after_reconciliation posting_batch_02)
(create_journal_post_for_accrual_case posting_batch_02 accrual_category_tax calc_rule_accrual_standard)
(finalize_batch_posting_and_release_service posting_batch_02 calc_service_primary accrual_category_tax)
```

The actions reference calculation_completed and other predicates that need to be satisfied for these objects to progress through the workflow.
